© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	ProductLaunchFormula.com
The Core ELEMENTS of a Successful Launch
LESSON 1 ACTION GUIDE
Welcome!
If you're interested in starting a business (or growing an existing business), you're in the
right place.
I've had almost a million students go through this Launch Workshop since 2005 (don't
worry, it's been updated many times over the years!) And the underlying core Launch
Formula has been tested in literally hundreds of markets and niches from around the world.
This action plan is designed to help you capture the critical lessons from this video, and give
you space to brainstorm your own launch.
The FIVE types of people that this is perfect for:
1. 	You already have an online business and you’re ready to take it to the next level.
2. 	You’re a practitioner or have a service business but you don’t have “time leverage” (to
increase sales you must work more hours).
3. 	You’re an author or soon-to-be author… or you’re an artist responsible for your own
marketing.
4. 	You have no business, no product, no list, and maybe even no ideas.
5. 	You want to be a launch coach or consultant and help others with their launches.
(If you fall into one of those five categories, you’re going to love the next lesson I have for
you… it’s about the three primary types of launches… including the Seed Launch, which is
where you can start with no list and no product, and you basically get paid to create that
first product and create that first list.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	ProductLaunchFormula.com
The Core ELEMENTS of a Successful Launch
LESSON 1 ACTION GUIDE
Looking ahead in the Launch Workshop…
Lesson Two – The Seed Launch and Beyond
In the next lesson, I’m going to show you the three specific launch campaigns that have
helped my business generate millions of dollars in sales… and more importantly, it’s helped
my students generate hundreds of millions of dollars in sales.
Those three launch campaigns – the Seed Launch, the Internal Launch, and the JV Launch -
will “meet you where you’re at.” They’ve been used by tiny solopreneur businesses… all the
way up to major companies.
You’ll also learn how to “stack” your launches so they get bigger and stronger as you go from
launch to launch… because once you learn how to do these launches, you’re going to want to
keep doing them.
Lesson Three – The Launch Blueprint
After the first two lessons, you’ve got the groundwork to launch. In this lesson we put it all
together for you. You’ll get the full-out blueprint that shows you my full Product Launch
Formula from a 30,000-foot level… and then drills into the details. And in the accompanying
video, I’ll walk you through the entire blueprint.
Lesson Four – Moving Forward and Next Steps
This lesson is all about you moving forward. I’m a big fan of learning, and I believe that
“learners are earners” and you can never be “too cool for school.”
But all the learning in the world won’t move you forward – so this lesson is all about you
moving into action. I’ve had thousands of students launch with huge success, and I want you
to take your place in that army – and that’s what this lesson is about.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
